rows.label: qev051507_MSG0001
rows.name:
You finally came!
I've been waiting forever![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051507_MSG0002
rows.name: Well, there's no need for words between us anymore, is there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051507_MSG0003
rows.name:
We've always clashed like this!
Right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051507_MSG0004
rows.name: Let's get right to it—here we go![ST:wait ]
